findings.evidence: `LinearSystemDegreeZero.lean:7` imports only `TauCeti.AlgebraicGeometry.WeilDivisor.LinearSystem`; `LinearSystem.lean:128-175` already contains the complete-linear-system degree API, including `weightedDegree_eq_of_mem_completeLinearSystem`, negative-degree emptiness, `degree_eq_of_mem_completeLinearSystem`, and `nonempty_completeLinearSystem_iff`.
findings.fix: Move the weighted and unweighted degree-zero lemmas into `TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/LinearSystem.lean`, near `weightedDegree_eq_of_mem_completeLinearSystem`, `completeLinearSystem_eq_empty_of_weightedDegree_neg`, and the unweighted analogues.
findings.issue: All declarations in this new file are immediate degree-zero refinements of the existing `OrderSystem.completeLinearSystem` degree section, so putting them in `LinearSystemDegreeZero.lean` hides broadly useful core API behind an extra import.

summary: The new material is in the wrong home: these are generic complete-linear-system degree-zero corollaries and should live with the existing complete-linear-system degree API, not in a separate later module.
